videos.headline: Georgia overwhelms Vanderbilt with running game
videos.description: Nick Chubb rushes for 138 yards and two touchdowns in Georgia's 45-14 win over Vanderbilt.

videos.headline: Georgia strikes first with 33-yard TD run
videos.description: Running back Nick Chubb finds a hole and takes it to the house to give the Bulldogs the lead early.

videos.headline: Bulldogs score on 5-yard TD pass
videos.description: D'Andre Swift runs to the outside and catches a 5-yard pass then  dives for the pylon.  After being  reviewed the touchdown stands extending Georgia's lead.

videos.headline: Chubb strikes again with 14-yard TD run
videos.description: Georgia's Nick Chubb scores his second touchdown of the game this time from the 14-yard line to add to the Bulldog's lead.

videos.headline: Georgia scores on beautiful TD pass by  Fromm
videos.description: Jake Fromm throws a huge 47-yard pass to Terry Godwin who was open in the end zone to extend Georgia's lead.

videos.headline: Michel breaks for 50-yard TD run for the Bulldogs
videos.description: Sony Michel finds a hole and then breaks for a long run to the end zone, extending Georgia's lead in the third quarter.

videos.headline: Vandy shanks ugly punt
videos.description: Under pressure, Vanderbilt's Sam Loy punts it 15 yards to gift the Bulldogs good field position.

videos.headline: Vandy defense sacks Fromm
videos.description: Georgia quarterback Jake Fromm drops back and is sacked by Jay Woods for a loss of six yards.

videos.headline: Vandy gets on the board right before halftime
videos.description: Ralph Webb runs it in from the one-yard line for a touchdown, which cuts Georgia's lead before the half.

videos.headline: Bulldogs tack on another rushing TD
videos.description: Elijah Holyfield rips off a speedy 15-yard run marking the Bulldog's fourth rushing touchdown of the game.

videos.headline: Vanderbilt answers with 3-yard TD pass
videos.description: On fourth down, Kyle Shurmur connects with C.J. Duncan in the end zone for a touchdown to cut Georgia's lead in the fourth quarter.

videos.headline: Smart: 'We're sleepwalking out there'
videos.description: Despite leading at halftime, Georgia's head coach Kirby Smart says his defense needs to play with more enthusiasm in the second half.

videos.headline: Georgia's defense key to win over Vanderbilt
videos.description: Georgia linebacker Roquan Smith says making adjustments to the defense and playing with energy in the second half was the key to success against Vandy.
